political.s: Via parent company Johnson & Johnson: FEC: $6K PAC donations; 42% to Republican, 58% to Democratic committees.

labor.s: Via parent company Johnson & Johnson: 81 federal penalties totaling $25.1B since 2000 (Violation Tracker).

charity.s: $880M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~1.02% of revenue) via Johnson & Johnson Foundation.

environment.s: Via parent company Johnson & Johnson: CDP Climate Change: A- (2024) — leadership-band environmental disclosure with validated targets.

dei.s: Via parent company Johnson & Johnson: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #62 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: Via parent company Johnson & Johnson: 3 state regulator actions (NY AG, TX AG) (most recent 2026-01-01). ~$3.00B in known settlements. Attorney General James Co-Leads Bipartisan Coalition Urging Congress to Pass Legislation to Protect Communities from Illicit Xylazine

execPay.s: Via parent company Johnson & Johnson: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 360:1 (median employee pay $91,000) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: Listerine is an American brand of antiseptic mouthwash that is promoted with the slogan "Kills germs that cause bad breath". Named after Joseph Lister, who pioneered antiseptic surgery at the Glasgow Royal Infirmary in United Kingdom, Listerine was developed in 1879 by Joseph Lawrence, a chemist in St. Louis, Missouri.

health.s: Via parent company Johnson & Johnson: J&J — national opioid settlement (~$5B over 9 years) ($5.00B). FDA MAUDE: 27,000 adverse-event reports (24mo) — JOHNSON & JOHNSON MEDICAL. Sources: fda-maude-mfr, opioid-settlements.
